erc_proposals_layer2.highlight: ERC-8286: modular frame-account standard extending ERC-7579 for EIP-8141 frame transactions; adds 'supportsApprovalMode' and frame validator module type
EIP-8130 (Account Abstraction by Account Configuration): Base launching in next fork (September); EOAs work out of the box, no EVM changes required, cross-chain portable
EIP-8130 uses singleton account configuration contract, deterministic authenticators (K1, P256, passkey), 2D nonce + nonceless transactions, and post-inclusion policy validation for performance
Base does not currently plan to support EIP-8141 alongside EIP-8130, but is watching the spec closely

action_items.action: Review ERC-8286 spec and provide feedback asynchronously in Discord
Watch for Base EIP-8130 announcement this week; review payer service spec and provide feedback

decisions.decision: Base is launching with EIP-8130 in its next fork, scheduled for September

targets.target: EIP-8130 launch on Base — September fork
Base EIP-8130 public announcement — end of this week (July 2026)
